project.name: 你造吗
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Playful AI product landing page with orange brand, rounded shapes, toy-like cards, energetic typography
project.designRead: Product showcase landing / creative competition judges / playful energetic / medium-low density / avoid corporate/minimal aesthetic

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Orange #FF6B00 as brand hero, warm yellow #FFB800 as accent
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: Single orange hue; accents use non-brand warm tones for variety

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Rounded, playful — large border-radius (10-28px), pill buttons, soft card edges
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Nunito display + Inter body, CJK fallback PingFang SC / Microsoft YaHei
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Rounded cards, pill tags, gradient buttons, emoji accents
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Light borders + subtle shadows (alpha ≤ 0.08), no heavy elevation
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Gradient blob backgrounds, playful illustrations, emoji as decorative elements
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Bouncy hover effects, smooth transitions, warm micro-interactions

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: No persistent nav — single-page scroll experience with logo in hero
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Orange #FF6B00 primary, warm yellow #FFB800 secondary accent
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Nunito bold for headings, Inter for body, CJK PingFang SC fallback
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: Light border + subtle shadow, no deep elevation
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: Rounded pill buttons with orange gradient, white text, glow shadow on hover
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: Center-aligned hero, card grids with consistent gutters

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Playful orange-driven brand with rounded shapes and energetic typography

pages.title: 创意展示页
pages.businessScenario: TRAE AI competition creative submission — show product concept, features, and value
pages.visualNorthStar: Energetic, warm, and playful — orange gradients with soft rounded shapes, feels like a creative toy store, not a corporate SaaS
pages.compositionPattern: Stacked narrative: hero → problem → solution showcase → feature cards → value statement → CTA
qualityRisks: long CJK text blocks need careful line-height

assets.semanticDescription: playful AI tool hero illustration with orange tones
